item.title: They are right, America is a racist country
item.description:
They are right, America is a racist country. And they are right we are trying to destroy it. GOOD. (That we are trying to destroy it)



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is not Independence Day
item.description:
This is not Independence Day. It is change of ownership day, because it is not independence for the indigenous people that is independence from the extreme harm that the American empire has caused and it is not independence for the working class.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Green washing is a well studied phenomenon and it is genuinely not new
item.description:
Green washing is a well studied phenomenon and it is genuinely not new. Rhodesia did the exact same thing in the striking just how similar this language is and I want you to really sit and think about the hypocrisy of a settler telling you that the land they just stole is better under their watch.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Being queer has always been about resistance too the systems of oppression against queer people and first and foremost that mean...
item.description:
Being queer has always been about resistance too the systems of oppression against queer people and first and foremost that means the freedom from g*nocide. So yes, if you can’t get behind that you’re not queer.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Would you be proud to be an Israeli?
item.description:
Would you be proud to be an Israeli? A Rhodesian? I don’t think so and America is the blueprint for all of those.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
